specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We specialize in a comprehensive range of marine services designed to meet the needs of boat owners throughout South Florida and the surrounding coastal communities. Whether you're preparing for a long passage or just keeping up with routine maintenance, Ben's Boatworks is the marine services partner you can count on.

Our team handles everything from detailed boat surveying and inspection — giving you a clear, accurate picture of your vessel's condition — to professional diving and underwater services for hull cleaning, prop work, and below-the-waterline repairs. We also install and service marine AC and climate control systems to keep your time on the water comfortable in any conditions, and our marine plumbing and sanitation work covers everything from through-hull fittings to head systems and holding tanks. These aren't side offerings — they're the core of what we do.

At Ben's Boatworks, we understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way. We serve boat owners across South Florida, working within a 60-mile radius of Annapolis, MD, and we're committed to delivering honest, reliable work on every job. Our clients range from liveaboards and weekend cruisers to serious offshore boaters, and we bring the same level of care and attention to every vessel that comes through our doors.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey and inspection gives vessel owners and buyers an accurate, documented assessment of a boat's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition. Ben's Boatworks conducts detailed pre-purchase surveys, insurance surveys, and condition-and-value reports that cover everything from the hull and deck to electrical systems and below-the-waterline components. Having a qualified marine survey on record protects your investment and gives you confidence before any major decision.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Ben's Boatworks provides professional diving and underwater services to handle the work that can't be done from the dock, including hull cleaning, propeller inspection and removal, zinc replacement, and underwater repairs. Regular underwater maintenance helps prevent marine growth buildup, protects your running gear, and keeps your vessel performing efficiently. Our dive team works on a wide range of vessel types and can respond to both scheduled maintenance and unexpected underwater issues.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and repairs marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your vessel comfortable in warm and humid conditions. We work with self-contained and chilled-water systems, handling everything from routine refrigerant service and filter cleaning to full system replacements and new installations. A properly functioning marine HVAC system is essential for liveaboards and extended cruising, and we make sure yours is running efficiently before you head out.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Ben's Boatworks handles all aspects of marine plumbing and sanitation, including head systems, holding tanks, through-hull fittings, seacocks, and freshwater systems. Proper sanitation system maintenance is critical for both vessel safety and environmental compliance, and we make sure every component is functioning correctly and up to applicable standards. Whether you need a repair, an upgrade, or a full system overhaul, we bring the same careful attention to every plumbing job aboard.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Hull cleaning and zinc replacement via professional underwater diving
Marine air conditioning installation and refrigerant service aboard vessels
Propeller removal, inspection, and reinstallation by certified dive team
Head system repair and holding tank replacement for sanitation compliance
Through-hull fitting and seacock inspection, service, or replacement
Marine climate control system troubleshooting and full unit replacement
